title: Opening for Production Engineer at Astral Pipes

jsonLd.title: Opening for Production Engineer at Astral Pipes
jsonLd.description:
Astral Pipes has an exciting opening for a Production Engineer at our Mysuru office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Astral Pipes:
Astral Pipes is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Astral Pipes!
